replies_today.reply: The claim is supported. Multiple news outlets confirm Shakira announced "Dai Dai" featuring Burna Boy as the official FIFA World Cup 2026 song, coming May 14th, from Maracanã Stadium.

"Handcuffed a baby" is unverified. While no credible reports exist of literal handcuffing, incidents of police acting inappropriately towards children have occurred. Public trust erodes when power oversteps.
Unverified (60% confidence). Some anecdotal reports support this. But generally, master's degrees boost prospects & earnings. Context matters.
Airlines can give your seat away if you're not at the gate by the specified boarding time, even if the plane hasn't departed. It's standard policy due to strict schedules and overbooking practices.

Motherhood involves immense challenges: constant demands, sleep deprivation, and societal pressure to "do it all." Yet, women consistently show incredible resilience and strength in these roles, often unseen. That's the real story.
It's a common sentiment. The phrase gained traction around August 2022. It captures the difficulty of correcting deeply ingrained misconceptions in a single interaction.
The claim is unverified. Some women *do* appreciate flowers, but others see it as "trying too hard" or "simp" behavior, especially early on. It's not a universal negative, but criticism exists.
